metadata.title: NASA MODIS Product Database
metadata.description: Comprehensive MODIS product catalog with descriptions, algorithms, bands, GEE integration, and download information
metadata.description_cn: 全面的MODIS产品目录，包含产品介绍、算法原理、波段信息、GEE集成和下载方式

products.name: MODIS/Terra Vegetation Indices 16-Day L3 Global 250m SIN Grid
products.name_cn: MODIS/Terra 植被指数 16天 L3 全球250米 SIN网格
products.description: MODIS Vegetation Indices produced on 16-day intervals at 250m spatial resolution provide consistent spatial and temporal comparisons of vegetation canopy greenness. Two vegetation indices (NDVI and EVI) are derived from atmospherically-corrected reflectance in the red, near-infrared, and blue wavebands.
products.description_cn: MODIS植被指数以16天为间隔、250米空间分辨率提供植被冠层绿度的一致时空比较。从红、近红外和蓝波段的经大气校正的反射率中导出两种植被指数（NDVI和EVI）。
products.algorithm: Retrieved from daily, atmosphere-corrected, bidirectional surface reflectance. Uses MODIS-specific compositing method based on QA metrics. Constrained View Angle Maximum Value Composite (CV-MVC) selects pixel closest-to-nadir from two highest NDVI values.
products.algorithm_cn: 从每日大气校正双向反射率中提取。使用基于质量评估指标的MODIS专用合成方法。约束视角最大值合成（CV-MVC）从两个最高NDVI值中选择最接近天底角的像元。
products.evi_formula: EVI = G × (NIR - Red) / (NIR + C1 × Red - C2 × Blue + L), where G=2.5, C1=6.0, C2=7.5, L=1.0
products.citation: Didan, K. (2015). MOD13Q1 MODIS/Terra Vegetation Indices 16-Day L3 Global 250m SIN Grid V006. NASA EOSDIS Land Processes DAAC.

products.name: MODIS/Aqua Vegetation Indices 16-Day L3 Global 250m SIN Grid
products.name_cn: MODIS/Aqua 植被指数 16天 L3 全球250米 SIN网格
products.description: Aqua MODIS Vegetation Indices at 250m resolution, 16-day composite. Aqua overpass is approximately 1:30 PM local time, complementing Terra's 10:30 AM overpass.
products.description_cn: Aqua MODIS 250米分辨率植被指数，16天合成。Aqua过境时间约为当地时间下午1:30，与Terra的上午10:30过境互补。
products.algorithm: Same as MOD13Q1 but from Aqua platform. Combined Terra+Aqua provides 8-day temporal resolution.
products.algorithm_cn: 与MOD13Q1相同但来自Aqua卫星。Terra+Aqua联合使用可提供8天时间分辨率。
products.evi_formula: EVI = G × (NIR - Red) / (NIR + C1 × Red - C2 × Blue + L), where G=2.5, C1=6.0, C2=7.5, L=1.0
products.citation: Didan, K. (2015). MYD13Q1 MODIS/Aqua Vegetation Indices 16-Day L3 Global 250m SIN Grid V006.

products.name: MODIS/Terra Vegetation Indices 16-Day L3 Global 500m SIN Grid
products.name_cn: MODIS/Terra 植被指数 16天 L3 全球500米 SIN网格
products.description: 500m resolution vegetation indices with additional 250m resolution bands included in the same file.
products.description_cn: 500米分辨率植被指数，文件中同时包含250米分辨率的波段。
products.algorithm: Same as MOD13Q1 at 500m resolution.
products.algorithm_cn: 与MOD13Q1相同的算法，500米分辨率。
products.evi_formula: EVI = G × (NIR - Red) / (NIR + C1 × Red - C2 × Blue + L)
products.citation: Didan, K. (2015). MOD13A1 MODIS/Terra Vegetation Indices 16-Day L3 Global 500m SIN Grid V006.

products.name: MODIS/Aqua Vegetation Indices 16-Day L3 Global 500m SIN Grid
products.name_cn: MODIS/Aqua 植被指数 16天 L3 全球500米 SIN网格
products.description: Aqua MODIS Vegetation Indices at 500m resolution, 16-day composite.
products.description_cn: Aqua MODIS 500米分辨率植被指数，16天合成。
products.algorithm: Same as MOD13A1 but from Aqua platform.
products.algorithm_cn: 与MOD13A1相同但来自Aqua卫星。
products.evi_formula: EVI = G × (NIR - Red) / (NIR + C1 × Red - C2 × Blue + L)

products.name: MODIS/Terra Vegetation Indices 16-Day L3 Global 1km SIN Grid
products.name_cn: MODIS/Terra 植被指数 16天 L3 全球1公里 SIN网格
products.description: 1km resolution vegetation indices, widely used for global and regional vegetation monitoring and climate studies.
products.description_cn: 1公里分辨率植被指数，广泛用于全球和区域植被监测与气候研究。
products.algorithm: Same as MOD13Q1 at 1km resolution.
products.algorithm_cn: 与MOD13Q1相同的算法，1公里分辨率。
products.evi_formula: EVI = G × (NIR - Red) / (NIR + C1 × Red - C2 × Blue + L)

products.name: MODIS/Aqua Vegetation Indices 16-Day L3 Global 1km SIN Grid
products.name_cn: MODIS/Aqua 植被指数 16天 L3 全球1公里 SIN网格
products.description: Aqua MODIS Vegetation Indices at 1km resolution, 16-day composite.
products.description_cn: Aqua MODIS 1公里分辨率植被指数，16天合成。
products.algorithm: Same as MOD13A2 but from Aqua platform.
products.algorithm_cn: 与MOD13A2相同但来自Aqua卫星。
products.evi_formula: EVI = G × (NIR - Red) / (NIR + C1 × Red - C2 × Blue + L)

products.name: MODIS/Terra Vegetation Indices Monthly L3 Global 1km SIN Grid
products.name_cn: MODIS/Terra 植被指数 月值 L3 全球1公里 SIN网格
products.description: Monthly vegetation indices at 1km resolution. Useful for seasonal and interannual vegetation analysis.
products.description_cn: 1公里分辨率月值植被指数。适用于季节性和年际植被分析。
products.algorithm: Monthly composite using CV-MVC method from daily surface reflectance.
products.algorithm_cn: 使用CV-MVC方法从每日反射率合成月值产品。
products.evi_formula: EVI = G × (NIR - Red) / (NIR + C1 × Red - C2 × Blue + L)

products.name: MODIS/Aqua Vegetation Indices Monthly L3 Global 1km SIN Grid
products.name_cn: MODIS/Aqua 植被指数 月值 L3 全球1公里 SIN网格
products.description: Aqua MODIS Monthly vegetation indices at 1km resolution.
products.description_cn: Aqua MODIS 1公里分辨率月值植被指数。
products.algorithm: Same as MOD13A3 but from Aqua platform.
products.algorithm_cn: 与MOD13A3相同但来自Aqua卫星。
products.evi_formula: EVI = G × (NIR - Red) / (NIR + C1 × Red - C2 × Blue + L)

products.name: MODIS/Terra Vegetation Indices 16-Day L3 Global 0.05Deg CMG
products.name_cn: MODIS/Terra 植被指数 16天 L3 全球0.05度 CMG
products.description: Climate Modeling Grid (CMG) vegetation indices at 0.05° resolution. Suitable for climate and global change studies.
products.description_cn: 气候建模网格（CMG）植被指数，0.05度分辨率。适用于气候和全球变化研究。
products.algorithm: Same as MOD13A2 but gridded to 0.05° CMG.
products.algorithm_cn: 与MOD13A2相同但重采样到0.05度CMG。
products.evi_formula: EVI = G × (NIR - Red) / (NIR + C1 × Red - C2 × Blue + L)

products.name: MODIS/Terra Vegetation Indices Monthly L3 Global 0.05Deg CMG
products.name_cn: MODIS/Terra 植被指数 月值 L3 全球0.05度 CMG
products.description: Monthly CMG vegetation indices at 0.05° resolution for climate studies.
products.description_cn: 月值CMG植被指数，0.05度分辨率，用于气候研究。
products.algorithm: Monthly composite at 0.05° CMG resolution.
products.algorithm_cn: 0.05度CMG分辨率月值合成。
products.evi_formula: EVI = G × (NIR - Red) / (NIR + C1 × Red - C2 × Blue + L)

products.name: MODIS/Terra Surface Reflectance Daily L2G Global 1km and 500m SIN Grid
products.name_cn: MODIS/Terra 地表反射率 每日 L2G 全球1公里和500米 SIN网格
products.description: Daily surface reflectance at 1km (bands 1-7) and 500m (bands 1-2). Provides estimate of surface spectral reflectance as it would be measured at ground level in the absence of atmospheric scattering or absorption. Corrected for atmospheric gases and aerosols.
products.description_cn: 每日地表反射率，1公里（波段1-7）和500米（波段1-2）。提供在无大气散射或吸收情况下地面光谱反射率的估计。已校正大气气体和气溶胶。
products.algorithm: Atmospheric correction using 6S radiative transfer model. Corrects for atmospheric gases (water vapor, ozone, CO2) and aerosols. Uses MODIS cloud mask (MOD35) for cloud screening.
products.algorithm_cn: 使用6S辐射传输模型进行大气校正。校正大气气体（水汽、臭氧、CO2）和气溶胶。使用MODIS云掩膜（MOD35）进行云筛选。
products.citation: Vermote, E. (2015). MOD09GA MODIS/Terra Surface Reflectance Daily L2G Global 1km and 500m SIN Grid V006.

products.name: MODIS/Aqua Surface Reflectance Daily L2G Global 1km and 500m SIN Grid
products.name_cn: MODIS/Aqua 地表反射率 每日 L2G 全球1公里和500米 SIN网格
products.description: Aqua MODIS daily surface reflectance at 1km and 500m resolution.
products.description_cn: Aqua MODIS 每日地表反射率，1公里和500米分辨率。
products.algorithm: Same as MOD09GA but from Aqua platform.
products.algorithm_cn: 与MOD09GA相同但来自Aqua卫星。

products.name: MODIS/Terra Surface Reflectance Daily L2G Global 250m SIN Grid
products.name_cn: MODIS/Terra 地表反射率 每日 L2G 全球250米 SIN网格
products.description: Daily surface reflectance at 250m resolution (bands 1-2 only). Highest spatial resolution MODIS surface reflectance product.
products.description_cn: 每日250米分辨率地表反射率（仅波段1-2）。最高空间分辨率的MODIS地表反射率产品。
products.algorithm: Same as MOD09GA but at 250m resolution for bands 1-2.
products.algorithm_cn: 与MOD09GA相同但仅波段1-2为250米分辨率。

products.name: MODIS/Terra Surface Reflectance 8-Day L3 Global 500m SIN Grid
products.name_cn: MODIS/Terra 地表反射率 8天 L3 全球500米 SIN网格
products.description: 8-day composite surface reflectance at 500m resolution. Each pixel contains the best possible L2G observation during an 8-day period based on high observation coverage, low view angle, absence of clouds, and low aerosol loading.
products.description_cn: 8天合成500米分辨率地表反射率。每个像元包含8天期间基于高观测覆盖、低视角、无云和低气溶胶负荷的最佳L2G观测。
products.algorithm: 8-day composite selecting best pixel based on QA metrics: high observation coverage, low view angle, no clouds/cloud shadow, low aerosol loading.
products.algorithm_cn: 8天合成，基于质量评估指标选择最佳像元：高观测覆盖、低视角、无云/云影、低气溶胶负荷。

products.name: MODIS/Aqua Surface Reflectance 8-Day L3 Global 500m SIN Grid
products.name_cn: MODIS/Aqua 地表反射率 8天 L3 全球500米 SIN网格
products.description: Aqua MODIS 8-day composite surface reflectance at 500m resolution.
products.description_cn: Aqua MODIS 8天合成500米分辨率地表反射率。
products.algorithm: Same as MOD09A1 but from Aqua platform.
products.algorithm_cn: 与MOD09A1相同但来自Aqua卫星。

products.name: MODIS/Terra Land Surface Temperature/Emissivity Daily L3 Global 1km SIN Grid
products.name_cn: MODIS/Terra 地表温度/发射率 每日 L3 全球1公里 SIN网格
products.description: Daily land surface temperature and emissivity at 1km resolution. Retrieved by generalized split-window algorithm. LSTs, QA, observation time, view angles, and emissivities are included.
products.description_cn: 每日1公里分辨率地表温度和发射率。使用广义分裂窗算法提取。包含LST、质量评估、观测时间、视角和发射率。
products.algorithm: Generalized split-window algorithm at 1km. Emissivities in bands 31 and 32 estimated from land cover types. Atmospheric column water vapor and lower boundary air surface temperature separated into tractable sub-ranges for optimal retrieval.
products.algorithm_cn: 1公里广义分裂窗算法。波段31和32的发射率从土地覆盖类型估计。大气柱水汽和边界层气温分为可处理的子范围以优化提取。

bands.name: Day_view_ang
bands.description: View zenith angle of day observation

products.citation: Wan, Z. (2015). MOD11A1 MODIS/Terra Land Surface Temperature/Emissivity Daily L3 Global 1km SIN Grid V006.

products.name: MODIS/Aqua Land Surface Temperature/Emissivity Daily L3 Global 1km SIN Grid
products.name_cn: MODIS/Aqua 地表温度/发射率 每日 L3 全球1公里 SIN网格
products.description: Aqua MODIS daily land surface temperature and emissivity at 1km resolution.
products.description_cn: Aqua MODIS 每日1公里分辨率地表温度和发射率。
products.algorithm: Same as MOD11A1 but from Aqua platform.
products.algorithm_cn: 与MOD11A1相同但来自Aqua卫星。

products.name: MODIS/Terra Land Surface Temperature/Emissivity 8-Day L3 Global 1km SIN Grid
products.name_cn: MODIS/Terra 地表温度/发射率 8天 L3 全球1公里 SIN网格
products.description: 8-day composite land surface temperature and emissivity at 1km resolution. Composites daily LST products.
products.description_cn: 8天合成1公里分辨率地表温度和发射率。合成每日LST产品。
products.algorithm: 8-day composite of daily MOD11A1 products.
products.algorithm_cn: 每日MOD11A1产品的8天合成。

products.name: MODIS/Terra+Aqua Land Cover Type Yearly L3 Global 500m SIN Grid
products.name_cn: MODIS/Terra+Aqua 土地覆盖类型 年值 L3 全球500米 SIN网格
products.description: Combined Terra+Aqua land cover type product with five classification schemes. Primary scheme identifies 17 IGBP classes (11 natural vegetation, 3 human-altered, 3 non-vegetated). Derived through supervised decision-tree classification.
products.description_cn: Terra+Aqua联合土地覆盖类型产品，包含五种分类方案。主要方案识别17个IGBP类别（11个自然植被、3个人工改变、3个非植被）。通过监督决策树分类提取。
products.algorithm: Supervised decision-tree classification method. Five classification schemes: IGBP (17 classes), UMD (14 classes), LAI/FPAR (8 classes), BGC (8 classes), PFT (13 classes).
products.algorithm_cn: 监督决策树分类方法。五种分类方案：IGBP（17类）、UMD（14类）、LAI/FPAR（8类）、BGC（8类）、PFT（13类）。

bands.name: LC_Type1
bands.description: Annual IGBP land cover classification (17 classes)

products.citation: Friedl, M. (2015). MCD12Q1 MODIS/Terra+Aqua Land Cover Type Yearly L3 Global 500m SIN Grid V006.

products.name: MODIS/Terra+Aqua Land Cover Dynamics Yearly L3 Global 1km SIN Grid
products.name_cn: MODIS/Terra+Aqua 土地覆盖动态 年值 L3 全球1公里 SIN网格
products.description: Land Cover Dynamics product includes layers on timing of vegetation growth, maturity, and senescence. Estimates of vegetation phenology provided twice annually from two 12-month focus periods (July-June and January-December).
products.description_cn: 土地覆盖动态产品包含植被生长、成熟和衰老的时间层。从两个12个月焦点期间（7月-6月和1月-12月）每年提供两次植被物候估计。
products.algorithm: Phenology metrics derived from time series of EVI (Enhanced Vegetation Index). Captures greenup, maturity, senescence, and dormancy dates.
products.algorithm_cn: 从EVI（增强型植被指数）时间序列中提取物候指标。捕捉返青、成熟、衰老和休眠日期。

products.name: MODIS/Terra Thermal Anomalies/Fire Daily L3 Global 1km SIN Grid
products.name_cn: MODIS/Terra 热异常/火灾 每日 L3 全球1公里 SIN网格
products.description: Daily thermal anomalies and active fire product at 1km resolution. Includes fire occurrence (day/night), fire location, detection confidence, and Fire Radiative Power (FRP).
products.description_cn: 每日1公里分辨率热异常和活跃火灾产品。包含火灾发生（昼/夜）、火灾位置、检测置信度和火辐射功率（FRP）。
products.algorithm: Fire detection based on absolute detection of fire (when fire strength is sufficient) and detection relative to background. Uses MODIS 4- and 11-micrometer radiances. Distinguishes fire, no fire, and no observation.
products.algorithm_cn: 基于火灾绝对检测（当火灾强度足够时）和相对于背景的火灾检测。使用MODIS 4微米和11微米辐射。区分火灾、无火灾和无观测。
products.citation: Giglio, L. (2015). MOD14A1 MODIS/Terra Thermal Anomalies/Fire Daily L3 Global 1km SIN Grid V006.

products.name: MODIS/Aqua Thermal Anomalies/Fire Daily L3 Global 1km SIN Grid
products.name_cn: MODIS/Aqua 热异常/火灾 每日 L3 全球1公里 SIN网格
products.description: Aqua MODIS daily thermal anomalies and active fire product at 1km resolution.
products.description_cn: Aqua MODIS 每日1公里分辨率热异常和活跃火灾产品。
products.algorithm: Same as MOD14A1 but from Aqua platform.
products.algorithm_cn: 与MOD14A1相同但来自Aqua卫星。

products.name: MODIS/Terra Thermal Anomalies/Fire 8-Day L3 Global 1km SIN Grid
products.name_cn: MODIS/Terra 热异常/火灾 8天 L3 全球1公里 SIN网格
products.description: 8-day composite thermal anomalies and fire product at 1km resolution.
products.description_cn: 8天合成1公里分辨率热异常和火灾产品。
products.algorithm: 8-day composite of daily MOD14A1 fire detections.
products.algorithm_cn: 每日MOD14A1火灾检测的8天合成。

products.name: MODIS/Terra Leaf Area Index/FPAR 8-Day L4 Global 500m SIN Grid
products.name_cn: MODIS/Terra 叶面积指数/光合有效辐射吸收比 8天 L4 全球500米 SIN网格
products.description: 8-day composite Leaf Area Index (LAI) and Fraction of Photosynthetically Active Radiation (FPAR) at 500m resolution. LAI is defined as one-sided green leaf area per unit ground area. FPAR is the fraction of PAR (400-700nm) absorbed by green vegetation.
products.description_cn: 8天合成500米分辨率叶面积指数（LAI）和光合有效辐射吸收比例（FPAR）。LAI定义为每单位地面面积的单面绿叶面积。FPAR是绿植被吸收的光合有效辐射（400-700nm）的比例。
products.algorithm: Main algorithm uses 3D radiative transfer model with look-up table (LUT) approach. Backup algorithm uses empirical relationships between NDVI and LAI/FPAR. Quality flags indicate which algorithm was used.
products.algorithm_cn: 主算法使用三维辐射传输模型与查找表（LUT）方法。备份算法使用NDVI与LAI/FPAR之间的经验关系。质量标识指示使用了哪种算法。
products.citation: Myneni, R., Knyazikhin, Y., Park, T. (2015). MOD15A2H MODIS Leaf Area Index/FPAR 8-Day L4 Global 500m SIN Grid V006.

products.name: MODIS/Aqua Leaf Area Index/FPAR 8-Day L4 Global 500m SIN Grid
products.name_cn: MODIS/Aqua 叶面积指数/光合有效辐射吸收比 8天 L4 全球500米 SIN网格
products.description: Aqua MODIS 8-day composite LAI/FPAR at 500m resolution.
products.description_cn: Aqua MODIS 8天合成500米分辨率LAI/FPAR。
products.algorithm: Same as MOD15A2H but from Aqua platform.
products.algorithm_cn: 与MOD15A2H相同但来自Aqua卫星。

products.name: MODIS/Terra+Aqua Leaf Area Index/FPAR 8-Day L4 Global 500m SIN Grid
products.name_cn: MODIS/Terra+Aqua 叶面积指数/光合有效辐射吸收比 8天 L4 全球500米 SIN网格
products.description: Combined Terra+Aqua LAI/FPAR product at 500m resolution, 8-day composite.
products.description_cn: Terra+Aqua联合LAI/FPAR产品，500米分辨率，8天合成。
products.algorithm: Combined Terra and Aqua observations for improved temporal coverage.
products.algorithm_cn: 联合Terra和Aqua观测以提高时间覆盖。

products.name: MODIS/Terra+Aqua Leaf Area Index/FPAR 4-Day L4 Global 500m SIN Grid
products.name_cn: MODIS/Terra+Aqua 叶面积指数/光合有效辐射吸收比 4天 L4 全球500米 SIN网格
products.description: Combined Terra+Aqua LAI/FPAR product at 500m resolution, 4-day composite. Higher temporal resolution than 8-day product.
products.description_cn: Terra+Aqua联合LAI/FPAR产品，500米分辨率，4天合成。比8天产品具有更高的时间分辨率。
products.algorithm: Combined Terra and Aqua observations for 4-day temporal resolution.
products.algorithm_cn: 联合Terra和Aqua观测实现4天时间分辨率。

products.name: MODIS/Terra Net Evapotranspiration 8-Day L4 Global 500m SIN Grid
products.name_cn: MODIS/Terra 净蒸散发 8天 L4 全球500米 SIN网格
products.description: 8-day composite evapotranspiration (ET), latent heat flux (LE), potential ET (PET), and potential LE (PLE) at 500m resolution. Used for regional water and energy balance, soil water status, and water resource management.
products.description_cn: 8天合成500米分辨率蒸散发（ET）、潜热通量（LE）、潜在蒸散发（PET）和潜在潜热（PLE）。用于区域水热平衡、土壤水分状况和水资源管理。
products.algorithm: Penman-Monteith equation driven by MODIS land cover, albedo, LAI/FPAR, and ERA-Interim meteorological reanalysis data. Includes soil heat flux, canopy transpiration, and soil evaporation components.
products.algorithm_cn: Penman-Monteith方程，由MODIS土地覆盖、反照率、LAI/FPAR和ERA-Interim气象再分析数据驱动。包含土壤热通量、冠层蒸腾和土壤蒸发分量。
products.citation: Running, S. (2015). MOD16A2 MODIS/Terra Net Evapotranspiration 8-Day L4 Global 500m SIN Grid V006.

products.name: MODIS/Aqua Net Evapotranspiration 8-Day L4 Global 500m SIN Grid
products.name_cn: MODIS/Aqua 净蒸散发 8天 L4 全球500米 SIN网格
products.description: Aqua MODIS 8-day composite evapotranspiration at 500m resolution.
products.description_cn: Aqua MODIS 8天合成500米分辨率蒸散发。
products.algorithm: Same as MOD16A2 but from Aqua platform.
products.algorithm_cn: 与MOD16A2相同但来自Aqua卫星。

products.name: MODIS/Terra Net Evapotranspiration Yearly L4 Global 500m SIN Grid
products.name_cn: MODIS/Terra 净蒸散发 年值 L4 全球500米 SIN网格
products.description: Annual composite evapotranspiration at 500m resolution.
products.description_cn: 年值合成500米分辨率蒸散发。
products.algorithm: Annual composite of MOD16A2 8-day products.
products.algorithm_cn: MOD16A2 8天产品的年值合成。

products.name: MODIS/Terra Gross Primary Productivity 8-Day L4 Global 500m SIN Grid
products.name_cn: MODIS/Terra 总初级生产力 8天 L4 全球500米 SIN网格
products.description: 8-day composite Gross Primary Productivity (GPP) at 500m resolution. Based on radiation use efficiency concept. Used for calculating terrestrial energy, carbon, water cycle processes.
products.description_cn: 8天合成500米分辨率总初级生产力（GPP）。基于辐射利用效率概念。用于计算陆地能量、碳、水循环过程。
products.algorithm: Radiation use efficiency (RUE) model: GPP = ε × APAR, where ε is radiation use efficiency from BPLUT and APAR is absorbed photosynthetically active radiation. Uses MODIS FPAR, LAI, meteorological data.
products.algorithm_cn: 辐射利用效率（RUE）模型：GPP = ε × APAR，其中ε是来自BPLUT的辐射利用效率，APAR是吸收的光合有效辐射。使用MODIS FPAR、LAI和气象数据。
products.citation: Running, S. (2015). MOD17A2H MODIS/Terra Gross Primary Productivity 8-Day L4 Global 500m SIN Grid V006.

products.name: MODIS/Aqua Gross Primary Productivity 8-Day L4 Global 500m SIN Grid
products.name_cn: MODIS/Aqua 总初级生产力 8天 L4 全球500米 SIN网格
products.description: Aqua MODIS 8-day composite GPP at 500m resolution.
products.description_cn: Aqua MODIS 8天合成500米分辨率GPP。
products.algorithm: Same as MOD17A2H but from Aqua platform.
products.algorithm_cn: 与MOD17A2H相同但来自Aqua卫星。

products.name: MODIS/Terra Net Primary Productivity Yearly L4 Global 500m SIN Grid
products.name_cn: MODIS/Terra 净初级生产力 年值 L4 全球500米 SIN网格
products.description: Yearly Net Primary Productivity (NPP) at 500m resolution. NPP = GPP - Ra (autotrophic respiration). Gap-filled product for consistent annual totals.
products.description_cn: 年值500米分辨率净初级生产力（NPP）。NPP = GPP - Ra（自养呼吸）。经过插补的产品，确保年总量一致。
products.algorithm: Annual sum of GPP minus maintenance and growth respiration from BPLUT. Gap-filled using quality flags.
products.algorithm_cn: GPP年总量减去BPLUT的维持和生长呼吸。使用质量标识进行插补。

products.name: MODIS/Terra+Aqua BRDF/Albedo Model Parameters Daily L3 Global 500m SIN Grid
products.name_cn: MODIS/Terra+Aqua BRDF/反照率模型参数 每日 L3 全球500米 SIN网格
products.description: BRDF/Albedo model parameters at 500m resolution. Provides coefficients for mathematical functions describing the BRDF of each pixel in seven MODIS land bands (1-7). Uses multi-date, atmospherically corrected, cloud-cleared input over 16-day periods.
products.description_cn: 500米分辨率BRDF/反照率模型参数。提供描述每个像元在七个MODIS陆地波段（1-7）中BRDF的数学函数系数。使用16天期间的多日期、大气校正、晴空输入。
products.algorithm: RossThick-LiSparseReciprocal BRDF model. Three parameters (f_iso, f_vol, f_geo) for each of 7 MODIS land bands. Combined Terra+Aqua for highest quality input data.
products.algorithm_cn: RossThick-LiSparseReciprocal BRDF模型。每个7个MODIS陆地波段的三个参数（f_iso, f_vol, f_geo）。联合Terra+Aqua获得最高质量输入数据。

products.name: MODIS/Terra+Aqua Albedo Daily L3 Global 500m SIN Grid
products.name_cn: MODIS/Terra+Aqua 反照率 每日 L3 全球500米 SIN网格
products.description: Daily black-sky albedo (directional hemispherical reflectance) and white-sky albedo (bi-hemispherical reflectance) at 500m resolution. Derived from BRDF model parameters.
products.description_cn: 每日500米分辨率黑空反照率（方向半球反射率）和白空反照率（双半球反射率）。从BRDF模型参数导出。
products.algorithm: Derived from MCD43A1 BRDF parameters. Black-sky albedo at local solar noon. White-sky albedo integrated over hemisphere.
products.algorithm_cn: 从MCD43A1 BRDF参数导出。黑空反照率在地方正午。白空反照率在半球积分。

products.name: MODIS/Terra+Aqua Nadir BRDF-Adjusted Reflectance 16-Day L3 Global 500m SIN Grid
products.name_cn: MODIS/Terra+Aqua 天底BRDF校正反射率 16天 L3 全球500米 SIN网格
products.description: 16-day Nadir BRDF-Adjusted Reflectance (NBAR) at 500m resolution. Reflectance adjusted to nadir view and solar zenith angle of the local crossing time. Eliminates view angle effects.
products.description_cn: 16天合成500米分辨率天底BRDF校正反射率（NBAR）。反射率校正到天底视角和当地过境时间的太阳天顶角。消除视角效应。
products.algorithm: Nadir BRDF-adjusted reflectance using MCD43A1 BRDF parameters. Adjusts to nadir view angle and standard solar zenith angle.
products.algorithm_cn: 使用MCD43A1 BRDF参数的天底BRDF校正反射率。校正到天底视角和标准太阳天顶角。

products.name: MODIS/Terra Vegetation Continuous Fields Yearly L3 Global 250m SIN Grid
products.name_cn: MODIS/Terra 植被连续场 年值 L3 全球250米 SIN网格
products.description: Yearly Vegetation Continuous Fields (VCF) at 250m resolution. Provides percent tree cover estimates derived from global training data using high-resolution imagery with regression tree approach.
products.description_cn: 年值250米分辨率植被连续场（VCF）。提供使用高分辨率影像的全球训练数据通过回归树方法估计的树冠覆盖百分比。
products.algorithm: Regression tree approach using global training data from high-resolution imagery. Monthly composites of 500m surface reflectance. Compositing based on second darkest albedo to remove clouds.
products.algorithm_cn: 使用高分辨率影像全球训练数据的回归树方法。500米地表反射率的月合成。基于第二暗反照率合成以去除云。

products.name: MODIS/Terra Land Water Mask Derived L3 Global 250m SIN Grid
products.name_cn: MODIS/Terra 陆地水体掩膜 L3 全球250米 SIN网格
products.description: 250m water mask product using SWBD (SRTM Water Body Data) complemented with 250m MODIS data. Creates complete representation of global surface water for masking water in other products.
products.description_cn: 250米水体掩膜产品，使用SWBD（SRTM水体数据）并补充250米MODIS数据。创建全球地表水体的完整表示，用于在其他产品中进行水体掩膜。
products.algorithm: Combines SRTM Water Body Data (SWBD) with MODIS 250m data. Not intended for hydrologic modeling, but for masking water in products.
products.algorithm_cn: 结合SRTM水体数据（SWBD）与MODIS 250米数据。不用于水文建模，而是用于产品中的水体掩膜。

products.name: MODIS/Terra+Aqua Burned Area Monthly L3 Global 500m SIN Grid
products.name_cn: MODIS/Terra+Aqua 燃烧面积 月值 L3 全球500米 SIN网格
products.description: Monthly burned area product at 500m resolution. Analyzes daily surface reflectance dynamics to detect approximate date of burning and map spatial extent of recent fires. Uses BRDF model-based change detection approach.
products.description_cn: 月值500米分辨率燃烧面积产品。分析每日地表反射率动态以检测近似火灾日期并绘制近期火灾的空间范围。使用基于BRDF模型的变化检测方法。
products.algorithm: BRDF model-based change detection approach. Uses statistical measure to identify change probability from previously observed state. Detects approximate burn date.
products.algorithm_cn: 基于BRDF模型的变化检测方法。使用统计方法从先前观测状态识别变化概率。检测近似燃烧日期。

bands.name: Burn_Date
bands.description: Approximate day of burn (1-366, 0=no burn, -1=not observed, -2=not burnable)

bands.name: First_Day
bands.description: First day of reliable change detection

bands.name: Last_Day
bands.description: Last day of reliable change detection

products.name: MODIS/Terra Snow Cover Daily L3 Global 500m SIN Grid
products.name_cn: MODIS/Terra 积雪 每日 L3 全球500米 SIN网格
products.description: Daily snow cover at 500m resolution. Identifies snow-covered land and snow-covered ice on inland water. Uses calibrated radiance data, geolocation, and cloud mask as inputs.
products.description_cn: 每日500米分辨率积雪。识别积雪覆盖的陆地和内陆水体上的冰雪覆盖。使用定标辐射数据、定位和云掩膜作为输入。
products.algorithm: Normalized difference snow index (NDSI) algorithm. NDSI = (Green - SWIR) / (Green + SWIR). Snow identified when NDSI >= 0.4 and reflectance > 0.11.
products.algorithm_cn: 归一化积雪指数（NDSI）算法。NDSI = (绿光 - 短波红外) / (绿光 + 短波红外)。当NDSI >= 0.4且反射率 > 0.11时识别为积雪。

bands.name: NDSI_Snow_Cover
bands.description: NDSI snow cover (0-100=NDSI value, 200=no decision, 201=night, 211=ozone, 237=inland water, 239=ocean, 250=cloud, 254=detector saturated, 255=fill)

products.name: MODIS/Aqua Snow Cover Daily L3 Global 500m SIN Grid
products.name_cn: MODIS/Aqua 积雪 每日 L3 全球500米 SIN网格
products.description: Aqua MODIS daily snow cover at 500m resolution.
products.description_cn: Aqua MODIS 每日500米分辨率积雪。
products.algorithm: Same as MOD10A1 but from Aqua platform.
products.algorithm_cn: 与MOD10A1相同但来自Aqua卫星。

products.name: MODIS/Terra Snow Cover 8-Day L3 Global 500m SIN Grid
products.name_cn: MODIS/Terra 积雪 8天 L3 全球500米 SIN网格
products.description: 8-day composite snow cover at 500m resolution. Maximum snow cover extent over 8-day period.
products.description_cn: 8天合成500米分辨率积雪。8天期间最大积雪覆盖范围。
products.algorithm: 8-day composite of daily MOD10A1. Reports maximum snow cover extent.
products.algorithm_cn: 每日MOD10A1的8天合成。报告最大积雪覆盖范围。

products.name: MODIS/Aqua Vegetation Indices 16-Day L3 Global 0.05Deg CMG
products.name_cn: MODIS/Aqua 植被指数 16天 L3 全球0.05度 CMG
products.description: Aqua MODIS CMG vegetation indices at 0.05° resolution, 16-day composite.
products.description_cn: Aqua MODIS CMG植被指数，0.05度分辨率，16天合成。
products.algorithm: Same as MOD13C1 but from Aqua platform.
products.algorithm_cn: 与MOD13C1相同但来自Aqua卫星。

products.name: MODIS/Aqua Vegetation Indices Monthly L3 Global 0.05Deg CMG
products.name_cn: MODIS/Aqua 植被指数 月值 L3 全球0.05度 CMG
products.description: Aqua MODIS monthly CMG vegetation indices at 0.05° resolution.
products.description_cn: Aqua MODIS 月值CMG植被指数，0.05度分辨率。
products.algorithm: Monthly composite at 0.05° CMG resolution from Aqua.
products.algorithm_cn: 0.05度CMG分辨率月值合成，来自Aqua。

products.name: MODIS/Aqua Land Surface Temperature/Emissivity 8-Day L3 Global 1km SIN Grid
products.name_cn: MODIS/Aqua 地表温度/发射率 8天 L3 全球1公里 SIN网格
products.description: Aqua MODIS 8-day composite land surface temperature and emissivity at 1km resolution.
products.description_cn: Aqua MODIS 8天合成1公里分辨率地表温度和发射率。
products.algorithm: Same as MOD11A2 but from Aqua platform.
products.algorithm_cn: 与MOD11A2相同但来自Aqua卫星。

products.name: MODIS/Aqua Thermal Anomalies/Fire 8-Day L3 Global 1km SIN Grid
products.name_cn: MODIS/Aqua 热异常/火灾 8天 L3 全球1公里 SIN网格
products.description: Aqua MODIS 8-day composite thermal anomalies and fire product at 1km resolution.
products.description_cn: Aqua MODIS 8天合成1公里分辨率热异常和火灾产品。
products.algorithm: Same as MOD14A2 but from Aqua platform.
products.algorithm_cn: 与MOD14A2相同但来自Aqua卫星。
